message.content:
This is review pass #6 of a proximity-based docking system. Five previous reviews found and fixed 10 bugs total. Find ANY remaining bugs. If there are none, say "NO BUGS FOUND".

ALL PREVIOUSLY FIXED BUGS (do NOT re-report):
1. Key listener leak — dedicated refs
2. Double rAF loop — cancel before start
3. setDockingCallback overwrite mid-animation — state guard
4. stageSize zero on restore — width/height guard
5. Infinite rAF after done — stops loop, returns early
6. Infinite redirect loop — camera backup + 2s cooldown
7. Star position inconsistency — galaxyCenterRef in snapshot
8. Stale callback in exit() — cleared to null
9. Stale dockState in detection — reads live ref
10. sessionStorage.setItem throws — wrapped in try/catch

Files:
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useRocketMode.js
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\RocketLayer.jsx
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\RocketHUD.jsx
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.jsx
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.module.css

ONLY report 85%+ confidence ACTUAL bugs. Say "NO BUGS FOUND" if clean.

content.text: I'll read all the relevant files to perform a thorough review.
